There are companies who by their activity have no impact on the environment. s/ How can a green product be manufactured? increasing the number of materials increasing the efficiency of production using renewable materials reducing the life cycle of the product s/ In sustainable manufacturing the focus is on: making products using more materials avoid using risk materials reducing waste in the manufacturing process V Lean and clean manufacturing objectives are: to eliminate or reduce those activities that do not add value to a product. to increase the number of material used to increase the number of packages for a product. to eliminate or reduce the environmental impact. s/ Which of the following is / are example(s) of clean technologies? solid waste management wastewater treatment recycling the use of wind turbines the use of asbestos panels V Sustainability requires a balance between: people environment Profitability V Sustainability assurance is: a journey for any cmnpany. a destination for any company. X A green product is: a product designed to increase its environmental impact. a product colored in brown a product designed to reduce its environmental impact. a product colored in green Correct answer a product designed to reduce its environmental impact. X Which of the following statements is / are true? Utilization of non-renewable materials must increase to reduce waste. The energy per unit of product, to the principles of sustainability can be increased if it from renewable souræs. Clean manufacturing ensures responsible use of energy. In lean manufacturing there is overproduction. Correct answer Clean manufacturing ensures responsible use of energy. The industrial ecology focuses on: reducing pollution identifying inefficiencies and losses in manufacturing processes preventing pollution
